title: Middle-passive source-cache review: exact Husic-supported groups
scope: Unreviewed middle-passive action-by-lemma groups whose generated missing forms have exact local Husic source-cache support. A keep decision here means formal paradigm/source support, not corpus usage attestation.

decisionMeaning.keep: Retain generated middle-passive forms; source-cache paradigm evidence supports them or lack of retained corpus examples is not enough to suppress them.
decisionMeaning.noMiddlePassive: Suppress generated middle-passive forms after source review confirms non-active forms should not be produced.
decisionMeaning.middlePassiveThirdPersonOnly: Restrict finite middle-passive output to third person after source review confirms only impersonal or third-person forms are valid.
decisionMeaning.needs_source: Do not change generation yet; gather stronger source evidence.

decisionEvidence.basis: Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha shpresuar and do të ishe shpresuar; corpus absence is not enough to suppress the paradigm.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact personal middle-passive generated forms such as do të bisedohem and do të bisedohemi; this is formal paradigm support, not frequency evidence.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të durohemi and do të duroheshe; retained corpus rarity is not enough to prune the forms.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të fitohem and do të fitohemi; semantic narrowing should be handled separately from formal paradigm support.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha mbaruar and do të ishe mbaruar.
Kaikki independently names passive lexical forms mbarohet and mbarohen; that supports the non-active lexical sense but is narrower than the full personal paradigm.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha kënduar and do të ishe kënduar; corpus absence is likely register or semantics, not enough to suppress.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha shkurtuar and do të ishe shkurtuar; exact source-cache support covers a substantial missed subset.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha respektuar and do të ishe respektuar; this is a strong semantic passive case.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të botohemi and do të botoheni; subject semantics are narrower than arbitrary animate subjects.
Husic-derived local cache includes exact middle-passive generated forms such as do të isha kërkuar and do të ishe kërkuar; source-cache support is formal paradigm evidence, not common-usage evidence.
